headlines.title: Mallory McMorrow ends bid for Democratic Senate nomination in Michigan
headlines.description: The state senator’s decision sets up a two-person primary between former public health official Abdul El-Sayed and Rep. Haley Stevens.

headlines.title: As the nation turns 250, many Americans say flying the Stars and Stripes is now a red flag
headlines.description: The American flag can have many meanings, whether hung on front porches or waved in parades and protests. To some, it’s also tied up with President Trump.

headlines.title: America at 250 is riven with doubt and pessimism — but with glimmers of hope
headlines.description: Americans have a bleak outlook on the nation’s future ahead of its 250th birthday next month, with most saying the U.S. has already seen its best days and a record-low number saying they are extremely proud to be Americans, according to a new NBC News poll

headlines.title: Great American State Fair attendees say they haven’t noticed politics overshadowing the event
headlines.description: Trump kicked off the event with a headlining speech Wednesday after musical acts dropped out of the lineup citing concerns over partisanship.

headlines.title: Americans believe they aren’t being taught enough about democracy
headlines.description: For Thomas Jefferson, James Madison and other bold-face names struggling to bring about a new nation, an educated and informed citizenry was essential to the success of the American experiment.

headlines.title: Americans see a huge divide between haves and have-nots, new poll shows
headlines.description: A national NBC News poll finds 81% of Americans say there is more that divides than unites the wealthy and ordinary working people.

headlines.title: Interior secretary says administration will use the same company to repair Reflecting Pool
headlines.description: The administration has faced scrutiny for awarding a multimillion-dollar, no-bid contract to a company that previously worked on Trump properties.

headlines.title: Trump takes hard stance against communism during July 4 speech
headlines.description: President Trump is gearing up for the high-stakes NATO summit in Turkey after speaking before a crowd of thousands on the National Mall on July 4th. The president’s speech swung from messaging about America’s strength to pushing his administration’s agenda and blasting communism. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin reports.

headlines.title: Ken Burns says America’s founders would be ‘abjectly disappointed’ by Congress today
headlines.description: Documentary filmmaker Ken Burns joins Kristen Welker for a special edition of Meet the Press marking America’s 250th anniversary, reflecting on the lessons of the American Revolution, the fragility of democracy and why history offers hope for the future.

headlines.title: Paul Pelosi Apologizes After Alleged Hit-and-Run in California
headlines.description: Paul Pelosi, the husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi could face misdemeanor charges after he was involved in a minor hit-and-run incident in California. The sheriff’s office said the 86-year-old did not have any alcohol in his system and a spokesperson for the Pelosi family says he apologized to the owner of the vehicle he hit and will take responsibility for the damage.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Paul Pelosi could face hit-and-run charges after hitting a parked car in California
headlines.description: Rep. Nancy Pelosi’s husband admitted to officers he’d hit something but wasn’t sure what it was, so kept driving, the sheriff’s office said.
